pattern.styleContract: Protective and seasonal with overflow-prevention proof, roofline cleaning evidence, controlled amber warning accents, and a storm-check warning board as the signature move.

hero.title: ClearFlow gutter cleaning hero image
hero.alt: A professional gutter cleaner removing leaves from a residential gutter on a bright autumn day.

contact.serviceArea: Seasonal gutter cleaning for homes across the west hills, older tree-lined streets, and nearby suburbs

copy.eyebrow: Seasonal gutter cleaning before the downpour drama
copy.heroText: ClearFlow clears packed leaves, roof grit, seed pods, and surprise sludge so rainwater moves through the gutters instead of auditioning for your foundation.
copy.introText: If water is spilling over the edge, pooling near the house, or turning one downspout into a sad little fountain, it is time for a cleanout with a real flow check.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready for gutters that do their one job?
copy.quoteText: Call first, or text photos of the roofline, downspouts, and any overflow spots. We will confirm access, timing, and a clean estimate before the next rain gets ideas.

services.title: Overflowing edges
services.text: Water pouring over the gutter lip usually means leaves, roof grit, or seed pods are blocking the path.

services.title: Downspout trickles
services.text: A weak or silent downspout during rain can point to a packed elbow, buried clog, or debris jam.

services.title: Foundation splash zones
services.text: Pooling near walks, beds, or basement walls gets handled with clean gutters and a real discharge check.

process.title: Check access
process.text: We review photos, roof height, ladder setup, and any tricky gates or slopes before scheduling.

process.title: Clear and bag
process.text: Leaves and debris are removed, bagged, and kept out of garden beds, patios, and neighbor territory.

process.title: Flush the flow
process.text: Downspouts get a flow check so the water has a clear route away from the house.

proof.label: debris removed from beds and walks

notes: Works: the storm-check warning board and warning-sign rows give the page a memorable shape.
Proof: visible home-risk mitigation work. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Clear clogged gutters is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Call for gutter help, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic risk-prevention recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send photos from the ground, access notes, weather or date constraints, and the warning signs you noticed so the visit starts safely.
serviceDetails.prepNote: We review photos, roof height, ladder setup, and any tricky gates or slopes before scheduling.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Risk-check flow for Seasonal gutter cleaning for homes across the west hills, older tree-lined streets, and nearby suburbs: photos, weather, access, and no-go conditions shape the safe visit plan.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For gutter cleaning service, roof height, gutter runs, downspout locations, ladder reach, and debris level shape the quote before a crew is scheduled.
